Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-02-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION And Ntc Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery
Off Calendar Oct-10-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Scott Bullerwell's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery is granted in part and denied in part. The court does not find that objections have been waived. As the responses to Form Interrogatories include the following language: "disclose only those contentions which presently occur to such responding party;" and answers are "to the best of Plaintiff's memory and research," that language is ordered stricken.
A verified further response shall be made to 12.7 as set forth in the opposition.
As to 14.1 the response must be supplemented to verify that Plaintiff has made reasonable investigation and inquiry. The response otherwise may be adequate. Cannot force anything further, but may result in a preclusion from identifying any particular ordinance at trial.
As to 50.1, the response must be supplemented. The tape is a document, and the response must identify the person who has the document.
As to the Request For Production of Documents, the introductory paragraph is ordered stricken.
The court has received a notice of motion for the appointment of a discovery referee. That motion was not timely noticed and will not be heard.
Defendants' request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Discovery,
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Off Calendar
